title: AI-enabled Streamlit Dashboard
summary: Built a user-friendly data portal that allows anyone to analyze and export Snowflake data without needing SQL skills.
impact: Explored solutions that could help non-technical users to explore and download data on their own, with faster access to insights and AI summaries.
linkInfo: Fallback tip: If the primary link does not load, use the backup link.

title: Data Visualization Tableau Dashboard
summary: Built a Tableau infographic dashboard to inform readers on Singapore's 2025 general election results and provide aspiring candidates with insights on how to win in the next election.
impact: Improved election storytelling clarity with interactive visuals and geographic context.

title: Dunstan's Portfolio: Custom AI-Assisted Web Architecture
summary: A minimalistic and UI/UX friendly portfolio website built from the ground up without pre-made templates. Vibe-Coded using GitHub Copilot.
impact: Delivered a streamlined user experience that prioritizes high scannability, accessibility, and navigation speed, through minimalist design.

title: Data Migration Project
summary: Optimized global data migration across 7 APAC countries by automating 25% of workflows with automated governance rules. Reclaimed 1,200 annual hours and eliminated critical compliance risks.
impact: 1,200 annual manpower hours saved by automating 25% of the workflows.
